claims.claim_text: We introduce the any-precision LLM framework, which extends the concept of any-precision DNN to enable low-cost deployment of multiple, different-sized LLMs.
claims.closest_paper_title: Any-Precision LLM: Low-Cost Deployment of Multiple, Different-Sized LLMs

claims.claim_text: We propose a lightweight method for any-precision quantization of LLMs using a post-training quantization framework.
claims.closest_paper_title: Any-Precision LLM: Low-Cost Deployment of Multiple, Different-Sized LLMs

claims.claim_text: We develop a specialized software engine for efficient serving of LLMs quantized to varying bit-widths, achieving a memory footprint comparable to a single n-bit LLM.
claims.closest_paper_title: Any-Precision LLM: Low-Cost Deployment of Multiple, Different-Sized LLMs

claims.claim_text: Our solution demonstrates state-of-the-art model quality and inference throughput across all supported LLMs with varying bit-widths.
claims.closest_paper_title: Any-Precision LLM: Low-Cost Deployment of Multiple, Different-Sized LLMs
